name: Brilliant Dragon

granted_abilities.name: Butterfly Jump
granted_abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may move up to 3".

granted_actions.name: Intuition
granted_actions.effects: Look at the top three cards of your fate deck and then return them in any order.

extraction_notes: Limitations shows '-' which indicates no limitations apply
Butterfly Jump has a shield icon indicating it's a defensive ability
Intuition action has all dashes in the stat line columns (Rg, Skl, Rst, TN, Dmg), indicating it's a tactical action with no stat requirements
